summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Love Letters website changes. Backend APIs working correctly (9/9 tests passed). Frontend testing shows most requested changes implemented successfully, with section order correctly configured.
passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint responding correctly
Products API returning 17 products as expected
Hero section does NOT contain 'Poesia que se veste' text (successfully removed)
Section order correctly implemented: 'WRITE THAT LOVE LETTER' in second section, 'THIS IS A LOVE POEM' in third section
Paragraph 'E quando as palavras...' is NOT italic (italic styling removed)
Contact page loads with typewriter image that has gradient fade edges
Logo visibility in dark mode working (has brightness-0 and invert filters)
Dark mode has proper warm color scheme (dark background, light text)
Favicon is SVG format with envelope/heart design
Contact form fields are functional and submittable
